label: Ritual position (on interaction cell)
description: Places the pawn on the interaction cell of the ritual target thing.

facing.label: Facing
facing.description: Cardinal direction the pawn faces after arriving. Rot4.Invalid means no forced facing.

faceThing.label: Face thing
faceThing.description: If true, the pawn faces toward the ritual target thing instead of using a fixed facing direction. Cannot be combined with facing.

offset.label: Offset
offset.description: IntVec3 offset applied to the interaction cell position.
